title: Transparency Fix
description: Allows for transparency to be used in the textures of entities that are normally opaque.
body: # Transparency Fix This pack modifies vanilla core shaders to unlock alpha channel rendering for entities that are normally hard-coded to be opaque. It is designed to work alongside other resource packs; you must apply textures with transparency to see the effect. Supported Entities: Beds, Paintings, Shields, Tridents, Books (Lectern/Enchanting), and Banners.
